raw_consumer_statement: Best Buy owes me a total of {$4200.00}. Ive been trying to get my refund since XXXX and have not had any help from the representatives. They claim they sent a refund to my checking account, when in fact they actually withdrew the money. They requested copies of my bank statements as proof that I did not receive the funds. I have provided to them but they still wont issue my refund.
